Officer Lew (@officer_Lew)

BREAKING🚨: Cumberland Mall in Atlanta, GA has now BANNED unaccompanied juveniles after 3 PM following a chaotic "teen takeover" that forced businesses to shut down and led to over 19 arrests.

More than 10 firearms were recovered at the scene.

My Black Grandfather who worked for a company that used black men as free labor b4 his time is somehow accountable cuz he made sure I knew the horrible past.  U a real fried egg brain ass niggER 🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣

The Facts Dude 🤙🏽 (@Thefactsdude)

Afroman Lays Down Facts: Wrapping up his time on the stand, Afroman drops hard truths

As his time on the stand wrapped up today, Afroman decided to let the prosecution hear it.

If the deputies wanted to avoid public scrutiny, they shouldn’t have kicked down his door and stolen his money.

“I have a right to kick a can in my backyard, use my freedom of speech, turn my bad times into good times. Yes, I do…and I think I’m a sport for doin

Pay Up, Unc! AND take her a box of Bank Head Seafood This Friday!


No Arby’s or Almond Joy Slander Please! (@ChefSuchNSuch)

I always told my niece that if she got straight A's I would give her $500.  She really did it, in this economy!!!

  




— https://nitter.net/ChefSuchNSuch/status/2033993631950876805#m

It's the King!


T.I. (@Tip)

We so #TrueToAtlanta WE made Magic in the City last night. #LetEmKnow #HadToBeThere

— https://nitter.net/Tip/status/2033993621100270073#m

@theswagshopedgewood has always been about more than cuts — it’s about community. Atlanta helped us establish roots, and now we’re honoring those same values as we grow. Big love to @Square for being part of the journey. #ad

I woke up with ‘Mania on my Mind. This beat is so cold I had to kill it. Don’t trip Cody, minor setback for a major comeback and congrats to Jey for getting his first World Title! Inspired By Old Atlanta & TBS! #wrestling #codyrhodes #jeyuso #rap #atlanta
Had to get bro right before his show in the A tomorrow @Tommy Richman
Super rare throwback #netflix #comedy #triggerwarning
To laugh at another man’s fault is to make their same mistake yourself..#addiction #killamike #runthejewels
Outside w the legends! #wwe
Out here #wwe
Shoutout my boy stacks! #andre3000 #scientistsandengineers #grammy #rap
